examples: These two buildings typify the rich extremes of local architecture.
Everything about this farm stands in stark contrast to the surrounding acres of neatly rowed corn and soybean fields that typify modern agriculture.
This single item will suffice to typify all the rest.
"They both typify what St Helens is all about and are passionate about the club, " he said.
But it was left to Kluivert to typify Newcastle's evening by directing his close-range shot wide late on.
